chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2333 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.02.2018. Mr. Anwer H. Ansari Advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari A.P.G -=-=- Learned Asstt:A.G submits that through this petition, notification dated 16.12.2014 has been challenged issued by the Home Department placing the name of petitioner in 4th schedule and since three years have been passed, therefore, this petition appears to have become infructuous. Under the circumstances, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this constitutional petition which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
